<skill name="agent-reach">
# Agent Reach — Usage Guide

Upstream tools for 17 platforms. Call them directly.

Run `agent-reach doctor` to check which channels are available.

## ⚠️ Workspace Rules

**Never create files in the agent workspace.** Use `/tmp/` for temporary output and `~/.agent-reach/` for persistent data.

## Web — Any URL

```bash
curl -s "https://r.jina.ai/URL"
```

## Web Search (Exa)

```bash
mcporter call 'exa.web_search_exa(query: "query", numResults: 5)'
mcporter call 'exa.get_code_context_exa(query: "code question", tokensNum: 3000)'
```

## Twitter/X (bird)

```bash
bird search "query" -n 10                  # search
bird read URL_OR_ID                        # read tweet (supports /status/ and /article/ URLs)
bird user-tweets @username -n 20           # user timeline
bird thread URL_OR_ID                      # full thread
```

## YouTube (yt-dlp)

```bash
yt-dlp --dump-json "URL"                     # video metadata
yt-dlp --write-sub --write-auto-sub --sub-lang "zh-Hans,zh,en" --skip-download -o "/tmp/%(id)s" "URL"
                                             # download subtitles, then read the .vtt file
yt-dlp --dump-json "ytsearch5:query"         # search
```

## Bilibili (yt-dlp)

```bash
yt-dlp --dump-json "https://www.bilibili.com/video/BVxxx"
yt-dlp --write-sub --write-auto-sub --sub-lang "zh-Hans,zh,en" --convert-subs vtt --skip-download -o "/tmp/%(id)s" "URL"
```

> Server IPs may get 412. Use `--cookies-from-browser chrome` or configure a proxy.

## Reddit

```bash
curl -s "https://www.reddit.com/r/SUBREDDIT/hot.json?limit=10" -H "User-Agent: agent-reach/1.0"
curl -s "https://www.reddit.com/search.json?q=QUERY&limit=10" -H "User-Agent: agent-reach/1.0"
```

> Server IPs may get 403. Search via Exa instead, or configure a proxy.

## GitHub (gh CLI)

```bash
gh search repos "query" --sort stars --limit 10
gh repo view owner/repo
gh search code "query" --language python
gh issue list -R owner/repo --state open
gh issue view 123 -R owner/repo
```

## XiaoHongShu (mcporter)

```bash
mcporter call 'xiaohongshu.search_feeds(keyword: "query")'
mcporter call 'xiaohongshu.get_feed_detail(feed_id: "xxx", xsec_token: "yyy")'
mcporter call 'xiaohongshu.get_feed_detail(feed_id: "xxx", xsec_token: "yyy", load_all_comments: true)'
mcporter call 'xiaohongshu.publish_content(title: "Title", content: "Body text", images: ["/path/img.jpg"], tags: ["tag"])'
```

> Requires login. Use Cookie-Editor to import cookies.

> **Tip: Clean bloated output.** The XHS API returns large JSON with many unused fields.
> Pipe through the formatter to save context:
> ```bash
> mcporter call 'xiaohongshu.search_feeds(keyword: "query")' | agent-reach format xhs
> ```
> This keeps only: title, content, author, engagement counts, image URLs, and tags.

## Douyin (mcporter)

```bash
mcporter call 'douyin.parse_douyin_video_info(share_link: "https://v.douyin.com/xxx/")'
mcporter call 'douyin.get_douyin_download_link(share_link: "https://v.douyin.com/xxx/")'
```

> No login needed.

## WeChat Articles

**Search** (`miku_ai`):
```bash
# miku_ai is installed inside the agent-reach Python environment.
# Use the same interpreter that runs agent-reach (handles pipx / venv installs):
AGENT_REACH_PYTHON=$(python3 -c "import agent_reach, sys; print(sys.executable)" 2>/dev/null || echo python3)
$AGENT_REACH_PYTHON -c "
import asyncio
from miku_ai import get_wexin_article
async def s():
    for a in await get_wexin_article('query', 5):
        print(f'{a[\"title\"]} | {a[\"url\"]}')
asyncio.run(s())
"
```

**Read** (Camoufox — bypasses WeChat anti-bot):
```bash
cd ~/.agent-reach/tools/wechat-article-for-ai && python3 main.py "https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s/ARTICLE_ID"
```

> WeChat articles cannot be read with Jina Reader or curl. Use Camoufox.

## Weibo (mcporter)

```bash
# Trending topics
mcporter call 'weibo.get_trendings(limit: 20)'

# Search users
mcporter call 'weibo.search_users(keyword: "Lei Jun", limit: 10)'

# Get a user profile
mcporter call 'weibo.get_profile(uid: "1195230310")'

# Get a user's feed
mcporter call 'weibo.get_feeds(uid: "1195230310", limit: 20)'

# Get a user's hot posts
mcporter call 'weibo.get_hot_feeds(uid: "1195230310", limit: 10)'

# Search post content
mcporter call 'weibo.search_content(keyword: "artificial intelligence", limit: 20)'

# Search topics
mcporter call 'weibo.search_topics(keyword: "AI", limit: 10)'

# Get post comments
mcporter call 'weibo.get_comments(mid: "5099916367123456", limit: 50)'

# Get fans
mcporter call 'weibo.get_fans(uid: "1195230310", limit: 20)'

# Get followings
mcporter call 'weibo.get_followers(uid: "1195230310", limit: 20)'
```

> Zero config. No login needed. Uses the mobile API with auto-generated visitor cookies.

## Xiaoyuzhou Podcast (groq-whisper + ffmpeg)

```bash
# Transcribe a single podcast episode (outputs text to /tmp/)
~/.agent-reach/tools/xiaoyuzhou/transcribe.sh "https://www.xiaoyuzhoufm.com/episode/EPISODE_ID"
```

> Requires `ffmpeg` and a Groq API key (free).
> Configure the key with `agent-reach configure groq-key YOUR_KEY`.
> On first run, install the tools with `agent-reach install --env=auto`.
> Run `agent-reach doctor` to check status.
> Output Markdown files are saved to `/tmp/` by default.

## LinkedIn (mcporter)

```bash
mcporter call 'linkedin.get_person_profile(linkedin_url: "https://linkedin.com/in/username")'
mcporter call 'linkedin.search_people(keyword: "AI engineer", limit: 10)'
```

Fallback: `curl -s "https://r.jina.ai/https://linkedin.com/in/username"`

## V2EX (public API)

```bash
# Hot topics
curl -s "https://www.v2ex.com/api/topics/hot.json" -H "User-Agent: agent-reach/1.0"

# Topics in a node (node_name examples: python, tech, jobs, qna)
curl -s "https://www.v2ex.com/api/topics/show.json?node_name=python&page=1" -H "User-Agent: agent-reach/1.0"

# Topic details (extract topic_id from URLs like https://www.v2ex.com/t/1234567)
curl -s "https://www.v2ex.com/api/topics/show.json?id=TOPIC_ID" -H "User-Agent: agent-reach/1.0"

# Topic replies
curl -s "https://www.v2ex.com/api/replies/show.json?topic_id=TOPIC_ID&page=1" -H "User-Agent: agent-reach/1.0"

# User profile
curl -s "https://www.v2ex.com/api/members/show.json?username=USERNAME" -H "User-Agent: agent-reach/1.0"
```

Python example (`V2EXChannel`):

```python
from agent_reach.channels.v2ex import V2EXChannel

ch = V2EXChannel()

# Get hot topics (default 20 items)
# Returned fields: id, title, url, replies, node_name, node_title, content(first 200 chars), created
topics = ch.get_hot_topics(limit=10)
for t in topics:
    print(f"[{t['node_title']}] {t['title']} ({t['replies']} replies) {t['url']}")
    print(f"  id={t['id']} created={t['created']}")

# Get latest topics for a specific node
# Returned fields: id, title, url, replies, node_name, node_title, content(first 200 chars), created
node_topics = ch.get_node_topics("python", limit=5)
for t in node_topics:
    print(t["id"], t["title"], t["url"])

# Get one topic plus replies
# Returned fields: id, title, url, content, replies_count, node_name, node_title,
#                  author, created, replies (list of {author, content, created})
topic = ch.get_topic(1234567)
print(topic["title"], "—", topic["author"])
for r in topic["replies"]:
    print(f"  {r['author']}: {r['content'][:80]}")

# Get user info
# Returned fields: id, username, url, website, twitter, psn, github, btc, location, bio, avatar, created
user = ch.get_user("Livid")
print(user["username"], user["bio"], user["github"])

# Search (not supported by the public V2EX API; returns guidance instead)
result = ch.search("asyncio")
print(result[0]["error"])  # Use built-in site search or the Exa channel instead
```

> No auth required. Results are public JSON. V2EX node names are listed at https://www.v2ex.com/planes

## Xueqiu (public API)

```python
from agent_reach.channels.xueqiu import XueqiuChannel

ch = XueqiuChannel()

# Get stock quotes (symbol examples: SH600519 mainland China, SZ000858 Shenzhen, AAPL US, 00700 HK)
# Returned fields: symbol, name, current, percent, chg, high, low, open, last_close,
#                  volume, amount, market_capital, turnover_rate, pe_ttm, timestamp
quote = ch.get_stock_quote("AAPL")
print(f"{quote['name']} ({quote['symbol']}): {quote['current']} ({quote['percent']}%)")

# Search stocks
# Returned fields: symbol, name, exchange
stocks = ch.search_stock("Apple", limit=5)
for s in stocks:
    print(f"{s['name']} ({s['symbol']}) - {s['exchange']}")

# Hot posts
# Returned fields: id, title, text(first 200 chars), author, likes, url
posts = ch.get_hot_posts(limit=10)
for p in posts:
    print(f"{p['author']}: {p['text'][:50]}... ({p['likes']} likes)")

# Hot stocks (stock_type=10 popularity ranking, stock_type=12 watchlist ranking)
# Returned fields: symbol, name, current, percent, rank
hot = ch.get_hot_stocks(limit=10, stock_type=10)
for s in hot:
    print(f"#{s['rank']} {s['name']} ({s['symbol']}): {s['current']} ({s['percent']}%)")
```

> No login required. Agent Reach auto-fetches session cookies, and all public APIs can be used directly.

## RSS (feedparser)

```python
python3 -c "
import feedparser
for e in feedparser.parse('FEED_URL').entries[:5]:
    print(f'{e.title} — {e.link}')
"
```

- **Channel not working?** Run `agent-reach doctor` — it shows status and fix instructions.
- **Twitter fetch failed?** Ensure `undici` is installed: `npm install -g undici`. Configure a proxy if needed: `agent-reach configure proxy URL`.

# Agent Reach — Installation Guide

## For Humans

Copy this to your AI Agent:

帮我安装 Agent Reach：https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Panniantong/agent-reach/main/docs/install.md

> 🛡️ **Security-conscious?** Use safe mode — it won't auto-install system packages:
> ```
> 帮我安装 Agent Reach（安全模式）：https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Panniantong/agent-reach/main/docs/install.md
> 安装时使用 --safe 参数
> ```

## For AI Agents

### Goal

Install Agent Reach and all upstream tools so your user's agent has full internet access. After installation, you'll use the upstream tools directly (twitter-cli, rdt-cli, xhs-cli, yt-dlp, mcporter, gh CLI, etc.) — Agent Reach is just the installer and health checker.

### ⚠️ Boundaries

When fixing issues, stay within these limits:

- **DO NOT** run commands with `sudo` unless the user explicitly approved
- **DO NOT** modify system files outside `~/.agent-reach/`
- **DO NOT** install packages not listed in this guide
- **DO NOT** disable firewalls, security settings, or system protections
- **DO NOT** clone repos, create files, or run commands inside the agent workspace / working directory
- If something requires elevated permissions, **tell the user** what's needed and let them decide

### 📁 Directory Rules

All Agent Reach files go in dedicated directories — **never in the agent workspace**:

| Purpose | Directory | Example |
|---------|-----------|---------|
| Config & tokens | `~/.agent-reach/` | `~/.agent-reach/config.json` |
| Upstream tool repos | `~/.agent-reach/tools/` | `~/.agent-reach/tools/douyin-mcp-server/` |
| Temporary files | `/tmp/` | `/tmp/yt-dlp-output/` |
| Skills | `~/.openclaw/skills/agent-reach/` | SKILL.md |

**Why?** If you clone repos or create files in the workspace, it pollutes the user's project directory and can break their agent over time. Keep the workspace clean.

### Step 1: Install the basics

```bash
# 推荐：pipx（最省心）
pipx install https://github.com/Panniantong/agent-reach/archive/main.zip
agent-reach install --env=auto

# 如果你的 Python 来自 Homebrew / 遇到 PEP 668（externally-managed-environment）
# 用虚拟环境安装：
python3 -m venv ~/.agent-reach-venv
source ~/.agent-reach-venv/bin/activate
pip install https://github.com/Panniantong/agent-reach/archive/main.zip
agent-reach install --env=auto

This installs core infrastructure (gh CLI, Node.js, mcporter, Exa search, yt-dlp config) and activates these zero-config channels:

- Web (Jina Reader), YouTube, GitHub, RSS, Exa Search, V2EX, Bilibili (basic)

> 💡 **macOS / Homebrew Python 提示 `externally-managed-environment`？**
> 这是 PEP 668 保护，不是 Agent Reach 本身的问题。优先用 `pipx install ...`，或先创建 `venv` 再安装。

**Safe mode / Dry run:**

```bash
agent-reach install --env=auto --safe # Check only, no auto-install
agent-reach install --env=auto --dry-run # Preview what would be done

### Step 2: Ask the user which optional channels they want

After installing the basics, **ask the user** which additional channels they need. Present this list:

> 基础渠道装好了！你现在可以让我搜网页、看 YouTube、读 GitHub 等。
> 还有这些可选渠道，你需要哪些？
> - 🐦 **Twitter/X** — 搜推文、看时间线（需要登录 Cookie）
> - 📰 **微博** — 热搜、搜索、用户动态
> - 💬 **微信公众号** — 搜索和阅读公众号文章
> - 📈 **雪球** — 股票行情、热门帖子（需要登录 Cookie）
> - 🎙️ **小宇宙播客** — 音频转文字（需要免费 Groq Key）
> - 📕 **小红书** — 阅读、搜索、发帖（需要登录）
> - 📖 **Reddit** — 搜索和阅读帖子
> - 📺 **B站完整版** — 热门、排行、搜索
> - 🎵 **抖音** — 视频解析
> - 💼 **LinkedIn** — Profile、职位搜索
> 告诉我你要哪些，比如"帮我装微博和 Twitter"。或者说"全部装"。

Based on the user's choice, run:

```bash
agent-reach install --env=auto --channels=twitter,weibo # Example: user chose Twitter + Weibo
agent-reach install --env=auto --channels=all # User wants everything

Supported channel names: `twitter`, `weibo`, `wechat`, `xiaoyuzhou`, `xueqiu`, `xiaohongshu`, `reddit`, `bilibili`, `douyin`, `linkedin`, `all`

### Step 3: Fix what's broken

Run `agent-reach doctor` and check the output.

Try to get as many channels to ✅ as possible. If something failed during install or shows as ❌/⚠️ in doctor, diagnose the problem and try to fix it — but stay within the boundaries above. If a fix requires elevated permissions or system changes, ask the user first.

Only ask the user when you genuinely need their input (credentials, permissions, etc.).

### Step 3: Configure things that need user input

Some channels need credentials only the user can provide. Based on the doctor output, ask for what's missing:

> 🔒 **Security tip:** For platforms that need cookies (Twitter, XiaoHongShu), we recommend using a **dedicated/secondary account** rather than your main account. Cookie-based auth carries two risks:
> 1. **Account ban** — platforms may detect non-browser API calls and restrict or ban the account
> 2. **Credential exposure** — cookies grant full account access; using a secondary account limits the blast radius if credentials are ever compromised

> 🍪 **Cookie 导入（所有需要登录的平台通用）：**
> 所有需要 Cookie 的平台（Twitter、小红书、雪球等），**优先使用 Cookie-Editor 导入**，这是最简单最可靠的方式：
> 1. 用户在自己的浏览器上登录对应平台
> 2. 安装 [Cookie-Editor](https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/cookie-editor/hlkenndednhfkekhgcdicdfddnkalmdm) Chrome 插件

| `agent-reach install --env=auto --channels=all` | Install everything |
| `agent-reach install --env=auto --safe` | Safe setup (no auto system changes) |
| `agent-reach install --env=auto --dry-run` | Preview what would be done |
| `agent-reach doctor` | Show channel status |
| `agent-reach watch` | Quick health + update check (for scheduled tasks) |
| `agent-reach check-update` | Check for new versions |
| `agent-reach configure twitter-cookies "..."` | Unlock Twitter search + posting |
| `agent-reach configure proxy URL` | Unlock Reddit + Bilibili on servers |
| `agent-reach configure groq-key gsk_xxx` | Unlock Xiaoyuzhou podcast transcription |

  84→    p_conf.add_argument("--from-browser", metavar="BROWSER",
  85→                        choices=["chrome", "firefox", "edge", "brave", "opera"],
  86→                        help="Auto-extract ALL platform cookies from browser (chrome/firefox/edge/brave/opera)")
  87→
  88→    # ── doctor ──
  89→    sub.add_parser("doctor", help="Check platform availability")
  90→
  91→    # ── uninstall ──
  92→    p_uninstall = sub.add_parser("uninstall", help="Remove all Agent Reach config, tokens, and skill files")
  93→    p_uninstall.add_argument("--dry-run", action="store_true",
  94→                             help="Show what would be removed without making any changes")
  95→    p_uninstall.add_argument("--keep-config", action="store_true",
  96→                             help="Remove skill files only, keep ~/.agent-reach/ config and tokens")
  97→
  98→    # ── skill ──
  99→    p_skill = sub.add_parser("skill", help="Manage agent skill registration")
 100→    p_skill_group = p_skill.add_mutually_exclusive_group(required=True)
 101→    p_skill_group.add_argument("--install", action="store_true",
 102→                               help="Install SKILL.md to agent skill directories")
 103→    p_skill_group.add_argument("--uninstall", action="store_true",
 104→                               help="Remove SKILL.md from agent skill directories")
 105→
 106→    # ── format ──
 107→    p_format = sub.add_parser("format", help="Clean and format platform API output")
 108→    p_format.add_argument("platform", choices=["xhs"], help="Platform to format (xhs)")
 109→
 110→    # ── check-update ──
 111→    sub.add_parser("check-update", help="Check for new versions and changes")
 112→
 113→    # ── watch ──
 114→    sub.add_parser("watch", help="Quick health check + update check (for scheduled tasks)")
 115→
 116→    # ── version ──
 117→    sub.add_parser("version", help="Show version")
 118→
 119→    args = parser.parse_args()
 120→
 121→    # Suppress loguru noise unless --verbose
 122→    _configure_logging(getattr(args, "verbose", False))
 123→
 124→    if not args.command:
 125→        parser.print_help()
 126→        sys.exit(0)
 127→
 128→    if args.command == "version":
 129→        print(f"Agent Reach v{__version__}")
 130→        sys.exit(0)
 131→
 132→    if args.command == "doctor":
 133→        _cmd_doctor()
 134→    elif args.command == "check-update":
 135→        _cmd_check_update()
 136→    elif args.command == "watch":
 137→        _cmd_watch()
 138→    elif args.command == "setup":
 139→        _cmd_setup()
 140→    elif args.command == "install":
 141→        _cmd_install(args)
 142→    elif args.command == "configure":
 143→        _cmd_configure(args)
 144→    elif args.command == "uninstall":
 145→        _cmd_uninstall(args)
 146→    elif args.command == "skill":
 147→        _cmd_skill(args)
 148→    elif args.command == "format":
 149→        _cmd_format(args)

 155→def _cmd_install(args):
 156→    """One-shot deterministic installer."""
 157→    import os
 158→    from agent_reach.config import Config
 159→    from agent_reach.doctor import check_all, format_report
 160→
 161→    safe_mode = args.safe
 162→    dry_run = args.dry_run
 163→
 164→    config = Config()
 165→    print()
 166→    print("Agent Reach Installer")
 167→    print("=" * 40)
 168→
 169→    # Ensure tools directory exists (for upstream tool repos)
 170→    tools_dir = os.path.expanduser("~/.agent-reach/tools")
 171→    os.makedirs(tools_dir, exist_ok=True)
 172→
 173→    if dry_run:
 174→        print("DRY RUN — showing what would be done (no changes)")
 175→        print()
 176→    if safe_mode:
 177→        print("SAFE MODE — skipping automatic system changes")
 178→        print()
 179→
 180→    # ── Parse --channels ──
 181→    CHANNEL_INSTALLERS = {
 182→        "twitter":     _install_twitter_deps,
 183→        "weibo":       _install_weibo_deps,
 184→        "wechat":      _install_wechat_deps,
 185→        "xiaoyuzhou":  _install_xiaoyuzhou_deps,
 186→        "xiaohongshu": _install_xhs_deps,
 187→        "reddit":      _install_reddit_deps,
 188→        "bilibili":    _install_bili_deps,
 189→        # xueqiu: cookie-only, no install step
 190→        # douyin/linkedin: manual setup, no auto-install
 191→    }
 192→    COOKIE_CHANNELS = {"twitter", "xueqiu", "bilibili"}
 193→
 194→    requested_channels = set()
 195→    if args.channels:
 196→        raw = [c.strip().lower() for c in args.channels.split(",") if c.strip()]
 197→        if "all" in raw:
 198→            requested_channels = set(CHANNEL_INSTALLERS.keys()) | {"xueqiu", "douyin", "linkedin"}
 199→        else:
 200→            requested_channels = set(raw)
 201→
 202→    # Auto-detect environment
 203→    env = args.env
 204→    if env == "auto":
 205→        env = _detect_environment()

 207→    if env == "server":
 208→        print(f"Environment: Server/VPS (auto-detected)")
 209→    else:
 210→        print(f"Environment: Local computer (auto-detected)")
 211→
 212→    # Apply explicit flags
 213→    if args.proxy:
 214→        if dry_run:
 215→            print(f"[dry-run] Would configure proxy for Bilibili")
 216→        else:
 217→            config.set("bilibili_proxy", args.proxy)
 218→            print(f"✅ Proxy configured for Bilibili")
 219→
 220→    # ── Install core system dependencies (lightweight, always) ──
 221→    print()
 222→    if dry_run:
 223→        _install_system_deps_dryrun()
 224→    elif safe_mode:
 225→        _install_system_deps_safe()
 226→    else:
 227→        _install_system_deps()
 228→
 229→    # ── mcporter (for Exa search) ──
 230→    print()
 231→    if dry_run:
 232→        print("[dry-run] Would install mcporter and configure Exa search")
 233→    elif safe_mode:
 234→        _install_mcporter_safe()
 235→    else:
 236→        _install_mcporter()
 237→
 238→    # ── Install optional channels (only if --channels specified) ──
 239→    if requested_channels and not dry_run and not safe_mode:
 240→        print()
 241→        print("Installing optional channels...")
 242→        for ch_name in sorted(requested_channels):
 243→            installer = CHANNEL_INSTALLERS.get(ch_name)
 244→            if installer:
 245→                installer()
 246→
 247→    if requested_channels and dry_run:
 248→        print()
 249→        print(f"[dry-run] Would install optional channels: {', '.join(sorted(requested_channels))}")
 250→
 251→    # ── Auto-import cookies (only if cookie-needing channels are requested) ──
 252→    needs_cookies = bool(requested_channels & COOKIE_CHANNELS)
 253→    if env == "local" and needs_cookies and not safe_mode and not dry_run:
 254→        print()
 255→        print("Importing cookies from browser...")
 256→        print("  (macOS may ask for your login password to access the Keychain — this is normal,")
 257→        print("   it only happens once during install. Enter your password or click 'Allow'.)")
 258→        try:
 259→            from agent_reach.cookie_extract import configure_from_browser
 260→            results = configure_from_browser("chrome", config)
 261→            found = False
 262→            for platform, success, message in results:
 263→                if success:
 264→                    print(f"  ✅ {platform}: {message}")

 267→                results = configure_from_browser("firefox", config)

 274→        except Exception:
 275→            print("  -- Could not read browser cookies (browser might be open or password was denied)")
 276→    elif env == "local" and needs_cookies and dry_run:

 280→    # Environment-specific advice

 285→        print("   For Bilibili full access: agent-reach configure proxy http://user:pass@ip:port")
 286→        print("   Cheap option: https://www.webshare.io ($1/month)")

 288→    # Test channels
 289→    if not dry_run:

 291→        print("Testing channels...")

 296→        # Final status
 297→        print()
 298→        print(format_report(results))
 299→        print()
 300→
 301→        # ── Install agent skill ──
 302→        _install_skill()
 303→
 304→        print(f"✅ Installation complete! {ok}/{total} channels active.")
 305→
 306→        if not requested_channels:
 307→            # First install — hint about optional channels

 311→            print("   agent-reach install --channels=all  (install everything)")
 312→
 313→        # Star reminder

 315→        print("如果 Agent Reach 帮到了你，给个 Star 让更多人发现它吧：")
 316→        print("   https://github.com/Panniantong/Agent-Reach")
 317→        print("   只需一秒，对独立开发者意义很大。谢谢！")
 318→    else:

 323→def _install_skill():
 324→    """Install Agent Reach as an agent skill (OpenClaw / Claude Code / .agents)."""
 325→    import os
 326→    import shutil
 327→    import importlib.resources
 328→
 329→    def _is_english_locale(value: str) -> bool:
 330→        normalized = value.strip().lower()
 331→        return normalized.startswith("en") or normalized.startswith("english")
 332→
 333→    def _skill_resource_name() -> str:
 334→        locale_candidates = (
 335→            os.environ.get("AGENT_REACH_LANG", ""),
 336→            os.environ.get("LC_ALL", ""),
 337→            os.environ.get("LC_MESSAGES", ""),
 338→            os.environ.get("LANG", ""),
 339→        )
 340→        if any(_is_english_locale(candidate) for candidate in locale_candidates):
 341→            return "SKILL_en.md"
 342→        return "SKILL.md"
 343→
 344→    def _read_skill_markdown(skill_pkg):
 345→        resource_name = _skill_resource_name()
 346→        try:
 347→            return skill_pkg.joinpath(resource_name).read_text(encoding="utf-8")
 348→        except FileNotFoundError:
 349→            return skill_pkg.joinpath("SKILL.md").read_text(encoding="utf-8")
 350→
 351→    def _copy_skill_dir(target: str) -> bool:
 352→        """Copy entire skill directory (locale-specific SKILL.md + references/)."""
 353→        try:
 354→            # Clear existing installation
 355→            if os.path.exists(target):
 356→                shutil.rmtree(target)
 357→            os.makedirs(target, exist_ok=True)
 358→
 359→            # Get skill directory from package (with fallback for editable installs)
 360→            try:
 361→                skill_pkg = importlib.resources.files("agent_reach").joinpath("skill")
 362→                skill_md = _read_skill_markdown(skill_pkg)
 363→            except Exception:
 364→                from pathlib import Path
 365→                skill_pkg = Path(__file__).resolve().parent / "skill"
 366→                skill_md = _read_skill_markdown(skill_pkg)
 367→
 368→            # Copy SKILL.md using the selected locale file
 369→            with open(os.path.join(target, "SKILL.md"), "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
 370→                f.write(skill_md)
 371→
 372→            # Copy references/ directory
 373→            refs_pkg = skill_pkg.joinpath("references")
 374→            refs_target = os.path.join(target, "references")
 375→            os.makedirs(refs_target, exist_ok=True)
 376→
 377→            for ref_file in refs_pkg.iterdir():
 378→                name = ref_file.name if hasattr(ref_file, 'name') else str(ref_file).split('/')[-1]
 379→                if name.endswith(".md"):
 380→                    content = ref_file.read_text(encoding="utf-8") if hasattr(ref_file, 'read_text') else ref_file.read_text()
 381→                    with open(os.path.join(refs_target, name), "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
 382→                        f.write(content)
 383→
 384→            return True
 385→        except Exception as e:
 386→            print(f"  Warning: Could not install skill: {e}")
 387→            return False
 388→
 389→    # Determine skill install path (priority: .agents > openclaw > claude)
 390→    skill_dirs = [
 391→        os.path.expanduser("~/.agents/skills"),      # Generic agents (priority)
 392→        os.path.expanduser("~/.openclaw/skills"),    # OpenClaw
 393→        os.path.expanduser("~/.claude/skills"),      # Claude Code (if exists)
 394→    ]
 395→
 396→    # Insert OPENCLAW_HOME path at the beginning if environment variable is set
 397→    openclaw_home = os.environ.get("OPENCLAW_HOME")
 398→    if openclaw_home:
 399→        skill_dirs.insert(0, os.path.join(openclaw_home, ".openclaw", "skills"))
 400→
 401→    installed = False
 402→    for skill_dir in skill_dirs:
 403→        if os.path.isdir(skill_dir):
 404→            target = os.path.join(skill_dir, "agent-reach")
 405→            if _copy_skill_dir(target):
 406→                platform_name = "Agent" if ".agents" in skill_dir else "OpenClaw" if "openclaw" in skill_dir else "Claude Code"
 407→                print(f"Skill installed for {platform_name}: {target}")
 408→                installed = True
 409→
 410→    if not installed:
 411→        # No known skill directory found — create for .agents by default
 412→        target = os.path.expanduser("~/.agents/skills/agent-reach")
 413→        os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(target), exist_ok=True)
 414→        if _copy_skill_dir(target):
 415→            print(f"Skill installed: {target}")
 416→        else:
 417→            print("  -- Could not install agent skill (optional)")
 418→            print("  -- Tip: install OpenClaw, Claude Code, or create ~/.agents/skills/ manually")
 419→

 421→def _uninstall_skill():
 422→    """Remove SKILL.md from all known agent skill directories."""
 423→    import shutil
 424→
 425→    skill_dirs = [
 426→        ("~/.openclaw/skills/agent-reach", "OpenClaw"),
 427→        ("~/.claude/skills/agent-reach", "Claude Code"),
 428→        ("~/.agents/skills/agent-reach", "Agent"),
 429→    ]
 430→
 431→    # Also check OPENCLAW_HOME
 432→    openclaw_home = os.environ.get("OPENCLAW_HOME")
 433→    if openclaw_home:
 434→        skill_dirs.insert(
 435→            0,
 436→            (os.path.join(openclaw_home, ".openclaw", "skills", "agent-reach"), "OpenClaw"),
 437→        )
 438→
 439→    removed = False
 440→    for skill_path_template, platform_name in skill_dirs:
 441→        skill_path = os.path.expanduser(skill_path_template)
 442→        if os.path.isdir(skill_path):
 443→            try:
 444→                shutil.rmtree(skill_path)
 445→                print(f"  Removed {platform_name} skill: {skill_path}")
 446→                removed = True
 447→            except Exception as e:
 448→                print(f"  Could not remove {skill_path}: {e}")
 449→
 450→    if not removed:
 451→        print("  No skill installations found.")
 452→

 462→def _cmd_format(args):
 463→    """Clean and format platform API output from stdin."""
 464→    import json
 465→    import sys
 466→
 467→    if args.platform == "xhs":
 468→        from agent_reach.channels.xiaohongshu import format_xhs_result
 469→
 470→        raw = sys.stdin.read().strip()

 472→            print("Error: no input on stdin", file=sys.stderr)
 473→            sys.exit(1)

 481→        print(json.dumps(cleaned, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))

 484→def _install_system_deps():
 485→    """Install system-level dependencies: gh CLI, Node.js (for mcporter)."""
 486→    import shutil
 487→    import subprocess
 488→    import platform
 489→    import tempfile
 490→
 491→    print("Checking system dependencies...")
 492→
 493→    # ── gh CLI ──
 494→    if shutil.which("gh"):
 495→        print("  ✅ gh CLI already installed")
 496→    else:
 497→        print("  Installing gh CLI...")
 498→        os_type = platform.system().lower()
 499→        if os_type == "linux":
 500→            try:
 501→                # Official GitHub apt source setup without invoking a shell.
 502→                keyring_path = "/usr/share/keyrings/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg"
 503→                list_path = "/etc/apt/sources.list.d/github-cli.list"
 504→                arch = subprocess.run(
 505→                    ["dpkg", "--print-architecture"],
 506→                    capture_output=True, encoding="utf-8", errors="replace", timeout=10,
 507→                ).stdout.strip() or "amd64"
 508→                subprocess.run(
 509→                    ["curl", "-fsSL", "https://cli.github.com/packages/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg", "-o", keyring_path],
 510→                    capture_output=True, timeout=60,
 511→                )
 512→                repo_line = (
 513→                    f"deb [arch={arch} signed-by={keyring_path}] "
 514→                    "https://cli.github.com/packages stable main\n"
 515→                )
 516→                with open(list_path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
 517→                    f.write(repo_line)
 518→                subprocess.run(["apt-get", "update", "-qq"], capture_output=True, timeout=60)
 519→                subprocess.run(["apt-get", "install", "-y", "-qq", "gh"], capture_output=True, timeout=60)
 520→                if shutil.which("gh"):
 521→                    print("  ✅ gh CLI installed")
 522→                else:
 523→                    print("  [!]  gh CLI install failed. You can try: snap install gh, or download from https://github.com/cli/cli/releases")
 524→            except Exception:
 525→                print("  [!]  gh CLI install failed. You can try: snap install gh, or download from https://github.com/cli/cli/releases")
 526→        elif os_type == "darwin":
 527→            if shutil.which("brew"):
 528→                try:
 529→                    subprocess.run(["brew", "install", "gh"], capture_output=True, timeout=120)
 530→                    if shutil.which("gh"):
 531→                        print("  ✅ gh CLI installed")
 532→                    else:
 533→                        print("  [!]  gh CLI install failed. Try: brew install gh")
 534→                except Exception:
 535→                    print("  [!]  gh CLI install failed. Try: brew install gh")
 536→            else:
 537→                print("  [!]  gh CLI not found. Install: https://cli.github.com")
 538→        else:
 539→            print("  [!]  gh CLI not found. Install: https://cli.github.com")
 540→
 541→    # ── Node.js (needed for mcporter) ──
 542→    if shutil.which("node") and shutil.which("npm"):
 543→        print("  ✅ Node.js already installed")
 544→    else:
 545→        print("  Installing Node.js...")
 546→        try:
 547→            # Use NodeSource setup script without invoking a shell pipeline.
 548→            with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(delete=False, suffix=".sh") as tf:
 549→                script_path = tf.name
 550→            subprocess.run(
 551→                ["curl", "-fsSL", "https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_22.x", "-o", script_path],
 552→                capture_output=True, timeout=60,
 553→            )
 554→            subprocess.run(
 555→                ["bash", script_path],
 556→                capture_output=True, timeout=120,
 557→            )
 558→            try:
 559→                os.unlink(script_path)
 560→            except Exception:
 561→                pass
 562→            subprocess.run(
 563→                ["apt-get", "install", "-y", "-qq", "nodejs"],
 564→                capture_output=True, timeout=120,
 565→            )
 566→            if shutil.which("node"):
 567→                print("  ✅ Node.js installed")
 568→            else:
 569→                print("  [!]  Node.js install failed. Try: apt install nodejs npm, or nvm install 22, or download from https://nodejs.org")
 570→        except Exception:
 571→            print("  [!]  Node.js install failed. Try: apt install nodejs npm, or nvm install 22, or download from https://nodejs.org")
 572→
 573→    # ── undici (proxy support for Node.js fetch) ──
 574→    npm_cmd = shutil.which("npm")
 575→    if npm_cmd:
 576→        npm_root = subprocess.run([npm_cmd, "root", "-g"], capture_output=True, encoding="utf-8", errors="replace", timeout=5).stdout.strip()
 577→        undici_path = os.path.join(npm_root, "undici", "index.js") if npm_root else ""
 578→        if os.path.exists(undici_path):
 579→            print("  ✅ undici already installed (Node.js proxy support)")
 580→        else:
 581→            try:
 582→                subprocess.run([npm_cmd, "install", "-g", "undici"], capture_output=True, encoding="utf-8", errors="replace", timeout=60)
 583→                print("  ✅ undici installed (Node.js proxy support)")
 584→            except Exception:
 585→                print("  -- undici install failed (optional — may not work behind proxies)")
 586→
 587→    # ── yt-dlp JS runtime config (YouTube requires external JS runtime) ──
 588→    if shutil.which("node"):
 589→        ytdlp_config_dir = os.path.expanduser("~/.config/yt-dlp")
 590→        ytdlp_config = os.path.join(ytdlp_config_dir, "config")
 591→        needs_config = True
 592→        if os.path.exists(ytdlp_config):
 593→            with open(ytdlp_config, "r") as f:
 594→                if "--js-runtimes" in f.read():
 595→                    needs_config = False
 596→                    print("  ✅ yt-dlp JS runtime already configured")
 597→        if needs_config:
 598→            try:
 599→                os.makedirs(ytdlp_config_dir, exist_ok=True)
 600→                with open(ytdlp_config, "a") as f:
 601→                    f.write("--js-runtimes node\n")
 602→                print("  ✅ yt-dlp configured to use Node.js as JS runtime (YouTube)")
 603→            except Exception:
 604→                print("  -- Could not configure yt-dlp JS runtime (YouTube may not work)")
 605→
 606→    # NOTE: twitter-cli, weibo, xiaoyuzhou, wechat, xhs-cli etc. are optional.
 607→    # They are installed via --channels flag, not here.
 608→    # See CHANNEL_INSTALLERS in _cmd_install().

 611→def _install_xiaoyuzhou_deps():
 612→    """Install Xiaoyuzhou podcast transcription script."""
 613→    import shutil
 614→    from agent_reach.config import Config
 615→
 616→    config = Config()
 617→    print("Setting up Xiaoyuzhou podcast transcription...")
 618→
 619→    tools_dir = os.path.expanduser("~/.agent-reach/tools/xiaoyuzhou")
 620→    script_dst = os.path.join(tools_dir, "transcribe.sh")
 621→
 622→    if os.path.isfile(script_dst):
 623→        print("  ✅ Xiaoyuzhou transcription script already installed")
 624→    else:
 625→        # Copy script from package
 626→        script_src = os.path.join(os.path.dirname(__file__), "scripts", "transcribe_xiaoyuzhou.sh")
 627→        if os.path.isfile(script_src):
 628→            try:
 629→                os.makedirs(tools_dir, exist_ok=True)
 630→                import shutil as _shutil

 44→    config = copy.deepcopy(DEFAULT_CONFIG)
 45→    path = _resolve_config_path(config_path)
 46→    if not path:
 47→        return config
 48→
 49→    try:
 50→        raw = path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
 51→    except OSError as exc:
 52→        logger.warning("Failed to read config file %s: %s", path, exc)
 53→        return config
 54→

 56→        parsed = yaml.safe_load(raw) or {}
 57→    except yaml.YAMLError as exc:
 58→        logger.warning("Failed to parse YAML config %s: %s", path, exc)
 59→        return config
 60→
 61→    if not isinstance(parsed, dict):
 62→        logger.warning("Config root must be a mapping, got %s", type(parsed).__name__)
 63→        return config
 64→
